anti_claims: This organ JSON seed does not flip source authority away from core/organ_atlas.json and core/organ_registry.json.
Required paper/mechanism/code links prove declared structural references only, not runtime correctness or release readiness.
Selective concept, principle, axiom, and sibling-organ edges are not inferred from prose, specialty, family, or evidence class.
Absent selective organ edges are residual pressure, not evidence that no neighbours exist.
Generated markdown, graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

code_loci.role: Runtime authority for certificate-kernel fixture validation, exported-bundle validation, Lean/Lake subprocess execution, source-module manifest checks, public readout construction, negative-case enforcement, authority ceilings, and body-free receipt writing.

mechanism_refs.edge_justification: The organ's source module, Lean/Lake fixture, generated certificate rows, analyzer metadata, transition traces, typed CP2 actions, bounded Evolve reruns, source-module manifest digests, body-free receipts, authority counters, and negative cases validate the public certificate-kernel execution boundary without exposing proof/provider/oracle bodies or upgrading it to general theorem correctness, benchmark, release, or source-mutation authority.

omitted: runtime outputs beyond named public receipts
selective doctrine neighbours not named by atlas source rows
omission_receipt.reason: Organ instance preserves public-safe atlas/registry fields. Required links resolve only when source ids or paths resolve; selective law/concept/principle edges remain residual unless source evidence names ids.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Populate missing paper/mechanism/code links from source evidence, then bind concept/principle/axiom/wires_to edges only when ids are named.

organ_payload.claim_ceiling: It is a local tool-witness that the declared public fixture rows compiled and were adjudicated by the local Lean verifier; it does not authorize general proof authority, count oracle/provider output as proof, expose proof text, mutate source, claim a benchmark solve-rate, or authorize release.

source_atlas_row.agent_gloss: An agent runs it to get a structured pass/blocked receipt confirming a small public Lean/Lake fixture compiled in a temporary workspace copy and that declared transition rows were accepted, rejected, or left residual by the local Lean verifier, with oracle/provider sidecars carried only as comparison rows (never counted as proof), and no proof bodies, provider calls, or source mutation.
source_atlas_row.claim_ceiling_restated: It is a local tool-witness that the declared public fixture rows compiled and were adjudicated by the local Lean verifier; it does not authorize general proof authority, count oracle/provider output as proof, expose proof text, mutate source, claim a benchmark solve-rate, or authorize release.

code_loci.role: Runtime authority for certificate-kernel fixture validation, exported-bundle validation, Lean/Lake subprocess execution, source-module manifest checks, public readout construction, negative-case enforcement, authority ceilings, and body-free receipt writing.

source_atlas_row.human_gloss: It builds a small public Lean/Lake project, then runs the Lean verifier over declared "transition" rows that reference a set of generated "certificate" declarations, and writes a structured receipt showing which rows the verifier accepted, which it left unresolved or rejected, plus the exact build command, return code, and file hashes. The receipt is honest, inspectable evidence that a real Lean verifier ran on public material, with proof text, provider/oracle output, and private source deliberately excluded from the receipt and that exclusion recorded (not silently dropped) rather than passed off as evidence.

mechanism_refs.edge_justification: The organ's source module, Lean/Lake fixture, generated certificate rows, analyzer metadata, transition traces, typed CP2 actions, bounded Evolve reruns, source-module manifest digests, body-free receipts, authority counters, and negative cases validate the public certificate-kernel execution boundary without exposing proof/provider/oracle bodies or upgrading it to general theorem correctness, benchmark, release, or source-mutation authority.

source_atlas_row.wiring_note: Self-contained Lean replay/validation specimen (CP2 and Evolve are internal reruns over its own certificate rows) that binds only to the shared secret-exclusion scan, receipt writer, and authority-ceiling spine.

source_registry_row.claim_ceiling: tool witness only, not general proof authority
source_registry_row.classification_basis: builds and runs a public Lean/Lake certificate-kernel fixture, emits analyzer metadata, CP2 rerun evidence, Evolve rerun evidence, and leak-proof authority counters
